field.label: Currency
field.comment: When 'Base Currency' is chosen, payments will be processed in the store's default currency. Otherwise, the currency switcher's selection will determine the currency used.

field.label: Statement Descriptor Suffix
field.comment: Your final statement descriptor ends up being...

field.label: API Key
field.comment: While API key isn’t required for processing payments, it is essential for accessing advanced features. To obtain your API key, please visit this section of your Brippo portal.

field.label: Payment from Applicable Countries
field.comment: When enabled, our Payment Methods will only be available to the countries selected below.

group.label: Checkout
group.comment: UI component embedded into your self-hosted checkout.

field.label: Capture Method
field.comment: When a payment is authorised, the bank guarantees the amount and holds it on the customer's card for up to 7 days.

field.label: 3D Secure Threshold
field.comment: Order minimum amount to trigger 3D Secure.

field.label: Include Wallets
field.comment: Whether or not to include wallets additionally to manual card input.

field.label: Payment Methods Available
field.comment: Whether the payment methods available are automatic, based on your Connected Account settings or manually selected.

field.label: Title Logos
field.comment: The selected options will display the corresponding payment logos on the checkout page.

group.label: Checkout (Standalone)
group.comment: UI component embedded into your self-hosted checkout with only one payment method option.

group.label: Wallets Express Checkout
group.comment: Allow customers to do express checkout via Apple Pay, Google Pay and/or Stripe Link.

field.label: Capture Method
field.comment: When a payment is authorised, the bank guarantees the amount and holds it on the customer's card for up to 7 days.

field.label: Business Name
field.comment: This is the text that appears as PAY [BUSINESS NAME] in the payment modal. If left empty will show as 'GRAND TOTAL'.

field.label: Block Delivery Methods
field.comment: Block specific delivery methods even if quote and shipping address rules allow them.

field.label: Custom Placement
field.comment: Css selectors of the elements in which the buttons should be placed. Leave blank for default placing.

field.label: Minimum Amount Threshold
field.comment: Show only when the cart total amount is equal of greater than this number. 0 to disable.

field.label: Maximum Amount Threshold
field.comment: Show only when the cart total amount is equal of less than this number. 0 to disable.

field.label: Custom Placement
field.comment: Css selectors of the elements in which the buttons should be placed. Leave blank for default placing.

field.label: Minimum Amount Threshold
field.comment: Show only when the cart total amount is equal of greater than this number. 0 to disable.

field.label: Maximum Amount Threshold
field.comment: Show only when the cart total amount is equal of less than this number. 0 to disable.

field.label: Custom Placement
field.comment: Css selectors of the elements in which the buttons should be placed. Leave blank for default placing.

field.label: Minimum Amount Threshold
field.comment: Show only when the cart total amount is equal of greater than this number. 0 to disable.

field.label: Maximum Amount Threshold
field.comment: Show only when the cart total amount is equal of less than this number. 0 to disable.

field.label: Custom Placement
field.comment: Css selectors of the elements in which the buttons should be placed. Leave blank for default placing.

field.label: Minimum Amount Threshold
field.comment: Show only when the cart total amount is equal of greater than this number. 0 to disable.

field.label: Maximum Amount Threshold
field.comment: Show only when the cart total amount is equal of less than this number. 0 to disable.

field.label: Minimum Amount Threshold
field.comment: Show only when the cart total amount is equal of greater than this number. 0 to disable.

field.label: Maximum Amount Threshold
field.comment: Show only when the cart total amount is equal of less than this number. 0 to disable.

field.label: Apple Pay
field.comment: When 'auto' is selected, the wallet will only display if the customer has a saved card in the browser. If 'always' is selected, it will display regardless. Only supported browsers will show this wallet.

field.label: Google Pay
field.comment: When 'auto' is selected, the wallet will only display if the customer has a saved card in the browser. If 'always' is selected, it will display regardless. Only supported browsers will show this wallet.

field.label: Max Rows
field.comment: Defines the maximum number of rows the Express Checkout Element can use to render. Default is 0, meaning unlimited.

field.label: Max Columns
field.comment: Defines the maximum number of columns the Express Checkout Element can use to render.

field.label: Overflow
field.comment: When 'auto' is selected and the amount of wallet buttons exceeds the max rows/cols setting, a 'See more' link shows to hide overflowing buttons.

field.label: Buttons Height
field.comment: By default, the height of the buttons are 44 (px). You can override this to specify a custom button height in the range of 40 to 55 (px)

field.label: Buttons Corner Radius
field.comment: By default, the corner radius of the buttons is 4 (px). You can override this to specify a custom corner radius in the range of 0 to 20 (px).

field.label: Font Size Base
field.comment: Make sure that you choose a font size of at least 16px for input fields on mobile.

field.label: Pickup Input Values
field.comment: To save custom input fields in your order details, please consult our documentation for guidance.

group.label: Alternative Payment Types [Legacy]
group.comment: Allow customers to checkout via Apple Pay, Google Pay, or similar from any page of your website.

field.label: Capture Method
field.comment: When a payment is authorised, the bank guarantees the amount and holds it on the customer's card for up to 7 days.

field.label: Business Name
field.comment: This is the text that appears as PAY [BUSINESS NAME] in the payment modal. If left empty will show as 'GRAND TOTAL'.

field.label: Wallets Currency
field.comment: Display either the base currency amount or the selected currency amount in the wallet modal.

field.label: Request Agreements
field.comment: Request the customer to accept agreements in express locations (Cart, Minicart & Product Page).

field.label: Block Delivery Methods
field.comment: Block specific delivery methods even if quote and shipping address rules allow them.

field.label: Layout Placement
field.comment: CSS selector of the element you want the Express Checkout to be appended to. Leave empty to place in default position.

field.label: Minimum Amount Threshold
field.comment: Show only when the cart total amount is equal of greater than this number. 0 to disable.

field.label: Maximum Amount Threshold
field.comment: Show only when the cart total amount is equal of less than this number. 0 to disable.

field.label: Allowed Categories
field.comment: Show only for products within selected categories.

field.label: Layout Placement
field.comment: CSS selector of the element you want the Express Checkout to be pre-pended to. Leave empty to place in default position.

field.label: Form Validation Mode
field.comment: Only-Agreements mode will only require the checkout agreements form to be validated additionally, the shipping address and method is going to be requested by the wallet modal.

field.label: Layout Placement
field.comment: CSS selector of the element you want the Express Wallet to be appended to. Leave empty to place in default position.

group.label: Discount Code Input
group.comment: Display coupon code input for Minicart and Product Page locations.

field.label: Comment
field.comment: Display a comment for the discount code input.

group.label: Pay by Link
group.comment: Customer receives an email afterwards to finalize payment from Stripe-hosted checkout.

field.label: Capture Method
field.comment: When a payment is authorised, the bank guarantees the amount and holds it on the customer's card for up to 7 days.

field.label: Note for Customer after Payment Confirmation
Title Logos
field.comment: The selected options will display the corresponding payment logos on the checkout page.

group.label: Pay by Link Backend
group.comment: Customer receives an email afterwards to finalize payment from Stripe-hosted checkout.

field.label: Capture Method
field.comment: When a payment is authorised, the bank guarantees the amount and holds it on the customer's card for up to 7 days.

field.label: Note for Customer after Payment Confirmation

group.label: Brippo Terminal from Backend
group.comment: Send a payment request to one of your available Brippo terminals.

field.label: Capture Method
field.comment: When a payment is authorised, the bank guarantees the amount and holds it on the customer's card for up to 7 days.

group.label: Soft Fail Recovery
group.comment: With Soft Fail Recovery, when a payment authorization fails, the order is still created but marked “On Hold”, no error message is shown during checkout. The system then immediately notifies the customer a secure payment link, and once the new transaction succeeds, the hold is released and the order proceeds as normal.

field.label: Only After First Attempt
field.comment: If enabled, first time payment fails will be blocked as usual and error message displayed. Allow to pass on second try.

field.label: Affected Error Types
field.comment: Error types that this behaviour will be applied over.

field.label: Expire Order After
field.comment: Order will be canceled after this period and stock returned.

field.label: Notifications Before Expiration
field.comment: Times the customer will be notified after initial notification and before expiration. Time between notifications will vary depending on the expiration time.
